summary: Script is well-designed with strong Python practices. Workflow has major issues: (1) workflow_dispatch input config_json (line 20) is unused—confusing UX; (2) lines 58–63 contain fragile, repetitive inline Python parsing that duplicates logic; (3) jobs repeat checkout+Python setup (~lines 35–42, 87–90, 99–102); (4) output parsing would break silently if format changes. Refactor: use single shell/Python helper for parsing, honor workflow input, consolidate job setup.
